text:
Author: sunpoet
Date: Fri May  9 03:42:09 2014
New Revision: 353405
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/353405
QAT: https://qat.redports.org/buildarchive/r353405/

Log:
  - Add LICENSE
  - Pet portlint
  - Pass maintainership to submitter
  - While I'm here, remove Author line
  
  PR:		ports/189299
  Submitted by:	Muhammad Moinur Rahman <5u623l20@gmail.com>

Modified:
  head/math/p5-Math-Round-Var/Makefile
  head/math/p5-Math-Round-Var/pkg-descr

Modified: head/math/p5-Math-Round-Var/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/math/p5-Math-Round-Var/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:42:04 2014	(r353404)
+++ head/math/p5-Math-Round-Var/Makefile	Fri May  9 03:42:09 2014	(r353405)
@@ -3,14 +3,17 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	Math-Round-Var
 PORTVERSION=	1.0.0
-DISTVERSION=	v${PORTVERSION}
 CATEGORIES=	math perl5
 MASTER_SITES=	CPAN
 PKGNAMEPREFIX=	p5-
+DISTNAME=	${PORTNAME}-v${PORTVERSION}
 
-MAINTAINER=	ports@FreeBSD.org
+MAINTAINER=	5u623l20@gmail.com
 COMMENT=	Variations on rounding
 
+LICENSE=	ART10 GPLv1
+LICENSE_COMB=	dual
+
 USES=		perl5
 USE_PERL5=	modbuild
 

Modified: head/math/p5-Math-Round-Var/pkg-descr
==============================================================================
--- head/math/p5-Math-Round-Var/pkg-descr	Fri May  9 03:42:04 2014	(r353404)
+++ head/math/p5-Math-Round-Var/pkg-descr	Fri May  9 03:42:09 2014	(r353405)
@@ -6,5 +6,4 @@ values as objects.
 It also implements flexible scheme parsing, so that your programs and 
 modules can offload the how-to-round decisions to this module.
 
-Author: Eric L. Wilhelm <ewilhelm at cpan dot org>
 WWW: http://search.cpan.org/dist/Math-Round-Var/
